'''鈭歞h-w-ch-n''' ('''kadhawchenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:won|won]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-w-ch-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:won|won]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-w-ch-n
|-
! Lemma
| kadhawchenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhawchenoko|thidhawchenoko]] || [[word:jidhawchenoko|jidhawchenoko]] || [[word:shidhawchenoko|shidhawchenoko]] || [[word:kidhawchenoko|kidhawchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhawchenoko|thuthudhawchenoko]] || [[word:jujudhawchenoko|jujudhawchenoko]] || [[word:shushudhawchenoko|shushudhawchenoko]] || [[word:kukudhawchenoko|kukudhawchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhawchenoko|thudhawchenoko]] || [[word:judhawchenoko|judhawchenoko]] || [[word:shudhawchenoko|shudhawchenoko]] || [[word:kudhawchenoko|kudhawchenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhawchenoko|thudhawchenoko]] || [[word:judhawchenoko|judhawchenoko]] || [[word:shudhawchenoko|shudhawchenoko]] || [[word:kudhawchenoko|kudhawchenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhawchenoko|thothodhawchenoko]] || [[word:jojodhawchenoko|jojodhawchenoko]] || [[word:shoshodhawchenoko|shoshodhawchenoko]] || [[word:kokodhawchenoko|kokodhawchenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhawchenoko|thodhawchenoko]] || [[word:jodhawchenoko|jodhawchenoko]] || [[word:shodhawchenoko|shodhawchenoko]] || [[word:kodhawchenoko|kodhawchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhawchenoko|th忙dhawchenoko]] || [[word:j忙dhawchenoko|j忙dhawchenoko]] || [[word:sh忙dhawchenoko|sh忙dhawchenoko]] || [[word:k忙dhawchenoko|k忙dhawchenoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhawchenoko|thadhawchenoko]] || [[word:jadhawchenoko|jadhawchenoko]] || [[word:shadhawchenoko|shadhawchenoko]] || [[word:kadhawchenoko|kadhawchenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhawchenoko|thadhawchenoko]] || [[word:jadhawchenoko|jadhawchenoko]] || [[word:shadhawchenoko|shadhawchenoko]] || [[word:kadhawchenoko|kadhawchenoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
